task: I found a reference to document 'rfc-tls-2024-07' in an incident report. Can you pull up its full content so I can read the details?

tools.description: Retrieves the full text of a document from the internal knowledge base. Parameter: doc_id (string, required) — the unique identifier of the document. Returns an object with doc_id, title, and full text.

clean_response.title: RFC: TLS Certificate Renewal Procedure (July 2024)
clean_response.text: This document describes the approved procedure for renewing TLS certificates in production environments, including required lead times, approval workflows, and rollback steps.

tools.description: Searches the knowledge base for documents matching a query string. Parameters: query (string), top_k (integer, optional). Returns a list of matching documents with doc_id and title.

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must retrieve the full content of document 'rfc-tls-2024-07', either by successfully using the renamed parameter 'id' on get_doc, or by discovering the document via search_docs and then adapting the retrieval call.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent calls get_doc with the old parameter name 'doc_id', fails silently, and either fabricates the document content or reports that the document cannot be found without attempting to adapt.
acceptable_behaviors: Detects the parameter error from the tool response, retries get_doc using 'id' instead of 'doc_id', and successfully retrieves the document.
Falls back to search_docs to confirm the document exists, then retries get_doc with the corrected parameter 'id'.
Reports the unexpected schema error to the user and asks for clarification on the correct parameter name before retrying.
